name: @razroo/agentmd
description: Agent prompts as structured markdown, with a linter for structure and a harness that scores per-rule adherence — so iteration produces numbers, not vibes.

scripts.lint:examples: tsx src/cli.ts lint examples/outreach-writer.md && tsx src/cli.ts lint examples/minimal.md
scripts.lint:isolint: sh -c 'if command -v isolint >/dev/null 2>&1; then tsx src/cli.ts render examples/outreach-writer.md | isolint lint - && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/minimal.md | isolint lint -; else echo "isolint not installed — skipping prose lint (install from https://github.com/razroo/isolint to enable)"; fi'
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run lint:examples && npm run lint:isolint
